chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.D-32 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 302/2024 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on MA 303/2024 4.For hearing of Bail Application 28-03-2024 Mr. Suhbat Ali Joyo, Advocate along with applicant. ****** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. Applicant Meeran alias Meeran Kobhar seeks protective bail in Crime No.09 of 2023, registered at P.S, Andal Sundrani, for offence under Section 365-A PPC & 7 ATA. It is, inter-alia, contended that the applicant is innocent and has falsely been implicated in this case by the police; that the applicant is ready to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends his imminent arrest at the hands of police as NBWs have been issued against him by the trial Court. Hence, he seeks protection of law. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for period of six days is granted to the applicant subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.200,000/-(Two Lac) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of aforesaid period or the date when the applicant surrenders before the concerned Court, whichever occurs earlier. Meanwhile, operation of NBWs shall remain suspended for the above period. It is made clear that if the applicant failed to surrender before the trial Court within stipulated period, his bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. The bail application along with listed applications is disposed of in the above terms.

It is made clear that if the applicant failed to surrender before the trial Court within stipulated period, his bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. The bail application along with listed applications is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
